name: availability
description:
Check availability for one or more people using Google Calendar.
Returns busy time intervals within the requested time range. Does not return event details — only whether each person is free or busy.

Parameters:
- time_min/time_max: Time range to check (required). Use RFC3339 timestamps with the user's timezone offset from viewer context (e.g. 1970-01-31T12:00:00-08:00). Always include the offset.
- calendars: Email addresses of people to check, in array format. If omitted, checks the user's own calendar.
- timezone: IANA timezone (e.g. "America/Chicago") for the response times.

Use this tool to find available meeting times across multiple people.

time_min.description: Start of the time range to check (RFC3339 with timezone offset, e.g. 1970-01-31T12:00:00-08:00). Always include the user's timezone offset from viewer context.

time_max.description: End of the time range to check (RFC3339 with timezone offset, e.g. 1970-01-31T13:00:00-08:00). Always include the user's timezone offset from viewer context.

calendars.description: Email addresses of people whose availability to check. If empty, checks the user's own calendar.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the response (e.g. "America/Chicago"). Busy intervals will be returned in this timezone.
